UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT ALL HALLOWS PRESERVATION LP'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED IN ITS ENTIRETY. AT THIS STAGE OF THE CASE, THE COMPLAINT IS NOT BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS OR PRECLUDED BY THE PRIOR SETTLEMENTS. THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE THAT AS A MATTER OF LAW THAT THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENTS BAR CLAIMS ARISING FROM BACK-UPS OCCURRING AFTER JULY, 2008. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS DOES NOT NECESSARILY AND CLEARLY BAR EVERY CLAIM. CONCEALMENT IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED AND IS NOT UNCERTAIN. CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES LEGAL EFFECT OF THE LEASE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E QUIDACHAY, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT ALL HALLOWS PRESERVATION LP'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES FACTS RE: MALICE AND FRAUD. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E QUIDACHAY, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty Amanda L. Ebey (415-989-8070) appear for plaintiff pamela Canada opposing party. / No other appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ALL HALLOWS PRESERVATION LP's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts re: malice and fraud. Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty Amanda L. Ebey (415-989-8070) appear for plaintiff pamela Canada opposing party. / No other appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ALL HALLOWS PRESERVATION LP's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED in its entirety. At this stage of the case, the complaint is not barred by the statute of limitations or precluded by the prior settlements. The court cannot determine that as a matter of law that the settlement agreements bar claims arising from back-ups occurring after July, 2008. The statute of limitations does not necessarily and clearly bar every claim. Concealment is sufficiently alleged and is not uncertain. Cause of action for breach of contract sufficiently alleges legal effect of the lease. Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2013 Continued To Aug-02-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT ALL HALLOWS PRESERVATION LP's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to August 2, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of operative complaint to department 501 no later than July 17, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
